# Daily Report — 2026-07-14

## Task Completed
Added `delete_change_schedule_span` tool (DELETE cmn_schedule_span/{sys_id}).
The tool accepts a required `span_id` (32-char hex sys_id), sends a DELETE
request to the ServiceNow Table API, handles 204/200 success and 404 not-found
responses, and propagates network errors cleanly. Registered in
`change_coordinator` and `full` packages in both `tool_packages.yaml` slots.

- Total tests: 2246
- Coverage: 93%
- All passing: yes
